summary: Full-stack systems and DevOps engineer with 5 years of hands-on experience designing, building, deploying, and scaling production-grade systems. Strongest work spans backend engineering, distributed processing, AWS cloud infrastructure, CI/CD automation, workflow systems, observability, and production operations. Designs systems from business workflow and load requirements, then evolves architecture from lean MVPs to modular or distributed platforms when scale, reliability, or operational needs justify it.

projects.name: Event-Driven Processing Platform on AWS
projects.problem: Production workloads needed asynchronous processing, cloud scalability, failure isolation, and operational visibility across API, worker, queue, and infrastructure boundaries.
projects.solution: Built an AWS event-driven processing platform using CloudFormation, ECS Fargate, SNS/SQS, MongoDB, Redis pub/sub, and full observability.
key_engineering_decisions: Used SNS/SQS for asynchronous buffering and decoupling.
Used ECS Fargate for containerized worker execution.
Used Redis pub/sub for real-time communication.
Built observability with OpenTelemetry, AWS X-Ray, Prometheus, Loki, and CloudWatch.
Included retry logic, dead-letter queues, circuit breakers, and failure isolation.
projects.engineering_impact: Improved scalability, reliability, traceability, recoverability, and production operability for event-driven workloads.

projects.name: Tender Procurement Intelligence Platform
projects.problem: Procurement data had to be extracted and processed from 50+ government portals, replacing slow manual collection and processing.
projects.solution: Designed a distributed extraction platform using queue-based Playwright workers and ETL pipelines.
key_engineering_decisions: Used a worker fleet for parallel extraction.
Used queues for distributed processing.
Used ETL pipelines for transformation.
Applied validation and deduplication for data quality.
projects.engineering_impact: Built a distributed scraping system with 20 parallel workers completing extraction and processing cycles in about 5 minutes per batch, down from hours of manual effort.

projects.name: DevOps CI/CD Pipeline System
projects.problem: Software delivery needed repeatable environments, automated validation, security checks, containerization, deployment, observability, and rollback support.
projects.solution: Built an automated CI/CD system covering build, test, security scanning, Docker containerization, deployment, monitoring, and rollback.
key_engineering_decisions: Automated release validation.
Used Infrastructure as Code for reproducible environments.
Supported zero-downtime deployment patterns.
Included rollback capability.
projects.engineering_impact: Reduced manual deployment effort, improved release repeatability, and supported safer production delivery.

projects.name: Tax Rebate Processing & Refund Management Platform
projects.problem: Tax rebate operations relied on manual forms, spreadsheet tracking, and fragmented approval workflows.
projects.solution: Built a state-controlled financial workflow platform covering customer onboarding, identity verification, document processing, configurable tax calculations, staff review, refund approval, and refund reconciliation.
key_engineering_decisions: Modeled the rebate lifecycle as explicit workflow states.
Centralized review and approval.
Designed a controlled workflow engine instead of disconnected forms.
projects.engineering_impact: Replaced fragmented manual operations with a structured, auditable refund workflow.

projects.name: Handyman Marketplace System
projects.problem: A service marketplace needed authentication, payments, real-time workflows, and scalable backend infrastructure.
projects.solution: Built a full-stack marketplace platform supporting participant workflows, authentication, payments, real-time interactions, and backend infrastructure.
key_engineering_decisions: Treated marketplace behavior as an end-to-end workflow system.
Included scalable backend support.
Integrated real-time workflow behavior.
projects.engineering_impact: Enabled centralized marketplace operations across access, payment, and workflow coordination.

projects.name: Virtual Office - Real-Time Workspace
projects.problem: A virtual collaboration workspace needed live user presence, dynamic user states, and real-time interactions.
projects.solution: Built a presence-based collaboration platform using WebSocket real-time interactions.
key_engineering_decisions: Modeled user presence and dynamic state as first-class system data.
Used WebSockets for real-time communication across connected clients.
projects.engineering_impact: Improved visibility into user availability and real-time workspace coordination.

projects.name: Nutrifactor Mobile Commerce Platform
projects.problem: A mobile commerce platform needed a headless Shopify experience with inventory and order synchronization.
projects.solution: Built a React Native mobile commerce app integrated with Shopify GraphQL.
key_engineering_decisions: Used headless Shopify integration.
Used Shopify GraphQL APIs.
Built mobile client workflows for product, inventory, cart, order, and commerce operations.
projects.engineering_impact: Enabled mobile shopping and synchronized inventory and order workflows.

projects.name: Briefly - Multi-Tenant SaaS
projects.problem: Teams needed structured reporting, role-based access, and workflow automation across multiple workspaces.
projects.solution: Built a multi-workspace SaaS platform with role-based access, structured reporting, and real-time workflow automation.
key_engineering_decisions: Used a multi-workspace model.
Applied role-based access boundaries.
Built reporting workflows and real-time automation.
projects.engineering_impact: Centralized workspace reporting and role-based workflow coordination.

projects.name: CopyFlow - Workflow Management System
projects.problem: Document lifecycle operations needed strict state transitions and permission control.
projects.solution: Built a role-based document lifecycle system with controlled workflow states.
key_engineering_decisions: Modeled document processing as a lifecycle.
Enforced strict state transitions.
Applied role-based permission control.
projects.engineering_impact: Improved structure, auditability, and permission discipline in document workflow operations.

achievements: Designed a distributed scraping system with 20 parallel workers completing extraction and processing cycles in about 5 minutes per batch, down from hours of manual effort.
Automated procurement data extraction across 50+ government portals using queue-based Playwright workers and ETL pipelines.
Reduced full environment provisioning to a single-command deployment using Infrastructure as Code with Terraform and CloudFormation.
Built stateless architectures enabling seamless horizontal scaling with zero downtime.
Implemented comprehensive observability using Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, CloudWatch, AWS X-Ray, and Loki.
Reduced mean time to detection on production issues through comprehensive monitoring and observability.
Built controlled workflow systems for tax rebate processing, refund management, document lifecycle control, and multi-tenant SaaS workflow automation.
